stemHtml:
Given the following SNOWTAMs, what is true about the runway contamination and braking action at 02:25 UTC?

11300200 04L 5/5/5 75/100/75 NR/03/03 WET/SLUSH/WET SNOW
11300225 04R 5/3/2 100/50/75 NR/06/06 WET/SLUSH/SLUSH

options.a: On the last third of the runway, conditions are medium to poor.
options.b: Conditions are medium just after the threshold.
options.c: On the first half of the runway, conditions are medium to good.
options.d: On the second third of the runway, conditions are medium to good.
